messages.content:
Dear The Oak Tighes Hill
ð¨ Important announcement from Facebook

Your Instagram-linked Facebook page is expected to be permanently deleted due to identity theft. Creating an account that impersonates someone else or uses a fake name violates our policies. Therefore, your account will be permanently locked after 24 hours

If you think this is a misunderstanding, please confirm that this is indeed your account.

Request a review: https://security.help-acounts.info/community-standard-29666268335

Remember that you have 24 hours to complete the verification process before your account is permanently disabled. If we do not receive your response, our decision will be final.
Best regards,
Team Terms of Service Â© 2024 Inc
